content:
You are an AI expert specializing in advanced physics questions. You will be given a review text that points out errors in a solution to a physics question. Please extract, in a concise, clear and accurate manner, errors mentioned in this review. You are not critiquing the review itself, but rather summarizing the errors it has identified. The errors, which should be extracted, have been recorded, and you MUST list them one by one in the format of * * Incorrect Part: * * and * * Explanation of Mistake: * *, in order to provide a clear error report.
The review text are as follows: {review}.
